VC

Venture Math Lab

Monte Carlo for startup financing risk

SimulatorCompareMethodology

Scenario compare

Baseline vs stress case

Compare the same venture story under different market regimes, instruments, and dilution assumptions.

Baseline

A clean seed scenario with a post-money SAFE, target pool refreshes, and moderate pro rata behavior.

Comparison

A tighter seed case with a capped note, slower step-up, no pro rata, and reduced liquidity windows.
